finalized_plan.description: Use the search_agent to retrieve the Metropolitan Museum of Art’s online record for the portrait with accession number 29.100.5 to gather detailed metadata including the subject’s identity
Extract from that record the name and biographical details of the subject, ensuring it confirms he was a bishop
Locate in the record or linked scholarly or ecclesiastical information the documented details regarding the bishop’s consecration, specifically identifying the consecrators and co-consecrators
Compile the complete list of consecrators and co-consecrators responsible for the bishop’s consecration

For each name on the list, verify their historical biographies using reliable papal records and church history sources (through search_agent or literature) to determine which of these individuals eventually became pope
Identify the one individual among the consecrators and co-consecrators who, based on historical records, never ascended to the papacy
Perform verification steps, cross-checking multiple sources if needed, to ensure that the determined answer is correct
Provide the final answer with the name of the consecrator/co-consecrator who never became pope

root_cause_reasoning: The agent fabricate the answer without using search_agent
